title: Beta Hydroxybutyrate Measurement Using Cobas
author: Gary Cline
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y2bfyan

steps.title: Calibrate Cobas for β-Hydroxybutyrate by running...
steps.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for β-Hydroxybutyrate by running a β-Hydroxybutyrate standard and three ß-Hydroxybutyrate controls.

steps.title: Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus
steps.instruction: Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus. a) Pipette 3 µL of sample into cuvette. b) Add 105µL of ß-Hydroxybutyrate Reagent. c) Mixture is incubated at 37˚C for 10 minutes. d) Absorbance is measured at 505 nm.
